violations.text: The large milk case refrigeration unit was not in good repair (top of case). Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The top of the milk case located in the cafeteria area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment milk case was observed in the storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue, rodent droppings and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control, establishment is to clean and sanitize any and all droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on milk case 2. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/23/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and pest droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the hallway leading to kitchen broken milk case. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by mice droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. By person in charge pest control is active. Establishment must increase pest control and clean all pest droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2024

The floor in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
A dead rodent was observed on a glue board under preparation table. Person in charge removed rodent from facility. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by mice droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. By person in charge pest control is active. Food inspector recommend increase pest control visits. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
Ice buildup observed in the Large Dairy chest coolers. Ice shall be broken down. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2023

The floor in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
Ice buildup observed in the Dairy chest cooler. Ice shall be broken down. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023
